hero_description: Build an internal database platform where teams can provision, manage, and scale databases on-demand while maintaining centralized governance and cost control.

when_to_use.title: Instant Provisioning
when_to_use.description: Deploy databases in minutes with self-service portal.

when_to_use.title: Team Autonomy
when_to_use.description: Empower teams to manage their own database lifecycle.

when_to_use.title: Cost Transparency
when_to_use.description: Track and allocate database costs per team or project.

platform_built_for_scale_title: What Platform Teams Get with KubeDB
platform_built_for_scale_subtitle: Complete DBaaS platform software in your infrastructure.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Instant Self-Service
platform_built_for_scale.description: Developers get production-ready databases in minutes via GitOps, CLI, or internal portal.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Enterprise Governance
platform_built_for_scale.description: Central policies for security, resource limits, multi-tenancy, and compliance.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Built-in Observability
platform_built_for_scale.description: Native Prometheus metrics and Grafana dashboards for every database instance.

platform_built_for_scale.title: KubeStash Backups
platform_built_for_scale.description: Automated, incremental, encrypted backups to any object store with PITR support.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Zero-Downtime Operations
platform_built_for_scale.description: Automated upgrades, scaling, and failover with full lifecycle management.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Any Kubernetes, Anywhere
platform_built_for_scale.description: Works on-prem, public cloud, hybrid, air-gapped, and multi-cluster environments.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Multi-Team Support
platform_built_for_scale.description: Isolated namespaces and resources for different teams with fine-grained access control.

platform_built_for_scale.title: Usage Metering
platform_built_for_scale.description: Track resource consumption and costs per team with built-in chargeback capabilities.

platform_built_for_scale.title: GitOps Integration
platform_built_for_scale.description: Infrastructure as code with Git-based workflows for declarative database management.

how_it_works_subtitle: Your teams bring the Kubernetes infrastructure. KubeDB provides the software layer that transforms it into an enterprise DBaaS platform.

how_it_works_summary: Your infrastructure • Your control • Your data sovereignty
workflow_subtitle: From request to running database in minutes.

workflow_steps.description: Team member selects database type and configuration.

workflow_steps.title: Auto-Approval
workflow_steps.description: Policy engine validates and approves within quota.
